message:
Use local asupersync path to avoid version mismatch with consumers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ checksum = "5192cca8006f1fd4f7237516f40fa183bb07f8fbdfedaa0036de5ea9b0b45e78"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
@@ -494,7 +494,7 @@ source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "39cab71617ae0d63f51a36d69f866391735b51691dbda63cf6f96d042b63efeb"
 dependencies = [
  "libc",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -801,7 +801,7 @@ checksum = "3640c1c38b8e4e43584d8df18be5fc6b0aa314ce6ebf51b53313d4306cca8e46"
 dependencies = [
  "hermit-abi",
  "libc",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -935,7 +935,7 @@ version = "0.50.3"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "7957b9740744892f114936ab4a57b3f487491bbeafaf8083688b16841a4240e5"
 dependencies = [
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -1461,7 +1461,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "errno",
  "libc",
  "linux-raw-sys 0.11.0",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -1756,7 +1756,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "getrandom",
  "once_cell",
  "rustix 1.1.3",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -2085,7 +2085,7 @@ version = "0.1.11"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "c2a7b1c03c876122aa43f3020e6c3c3ee5c05081c9a00739faf7503aeba10d22"
 dependencies = [
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]

@@ -20,8 +20,8 @@ repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastapi_rust"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastapi_rust"
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
-# Runtime (our own) - override with path in .cargo/config.toml for local dev
-asupersync = "0.1.0"
+# Runtime (our own) - use local path for dev
+asupersync = { path = "../asupersync" }
 
 # Serialization (only these)
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
